Strategic Simulations Group
INITIALIZING PROTOCOLS...

Version. Beta-2

Strategic Simulations Group

Strategic Economic Competition

Public participants join by session code as Facilitator, Notetaker, or Observer. Live-demo seats per team are 1 facilitator, 4 notetakers, and 5 read-only observers. White Cell and Game Master use operator-only access.

Public Participant Join

Session-code access is limited to Facilitator, Notetaker, and Observer seats.

Operator Access

White Cell and Game Master are not public session-code seats. Enter the operator access code to claim the explicit operator surfaces below.

White Cell lead and support are separate seats. White Cell uses the session code and selected team above. Game Master access is operator-only and not claimable through public join.
